analysis.executive_summary: Audit of resend.com/docs crawled 715 pages with 100.14% coverage against 813 requested pages. 10 confirmed broken internal documentation links exist (all user-facing, zero repository links). API reference coverage is low at 37.21% across 118 detected API pages. Example code reliability shows 0% detection, flagged as a likely detection limitation due to JavaScript-rendered code blocks. Only 45.59% of pages display last-updated metadata, limiting freshness transparency.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100.14%, examining all discoverable documentation pages within scope
High overall audit confidence at 87.86%, with crawl confidence reaching 95%
Single-product topology provides clear documentation structure
Zero repository navigation broken links; all link issues are user-facing and fixable
Low SEO/geo issue rate at 4.79%, indicating solid technical foundation
risks: 10 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation and trust
API reference coverage at 37.21% leaves 62.79% of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
Example code reliability at 0% suggests detection failure; actual code quality unknown and unverifiable
Only 45.59% of pages show last-updated dates, obscuring content freshness for majority of documentation
1 unverified link due to auth/rate-limit/server blocks may hide additional broken external references
JavaScript-rendered code blocks prevent automated example validation, creating blind spot for code accuracy
API confidence at 85% and links confidence at 85.91% indicate moderate uncertainty in coverage metrics

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 10 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Expand API reference coverage from 37.21% to minimum 80% by documenting missing endpoints and linking usage examples
Implement last-updated metadata on all pages to increase freshness visibility from 45.59% to 95%+
Migrate code examples to static HTML or add server-side rendering to enable automated validation and reliability scoring
Investigate and resolve 1 unverified link; establish monitoring for auth-protected external references

limitations: Example code reliability at 0% indicates detection failure on JavaScript-rendered blocks; actual code quality, syntax correctness, and runnable status cannot be verified by external audit
1 unverified link blocked by authentication/rate-limiting/server issues may mask additional broken external references not discoverable without credentials
API coverage detection at 85% confidence may undercount or misclassify API pages if non-standard URL patterns or dynamic routing are used
Audit cannot verify accuracy of documentation content, code functionality, or alignment between docs and actual API behavior
Freshness metadata absence on 54.41% of pages prevents assessment of content staleness; pages may be outdated without visible indicators
